        Senior AI Engineer

        My Social Pulse

        Actively hiring

        Work from home

        ₹ 5,00,000 - 6,00,000 ₹ 5,00,000 - 6,00,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        Key Responsibilities: 1. Design and build AI avatar systems, including model training, fine-tuning, 3D facial reconstruction, texture synthesis, and facial animation pipelines. 2. Develop body and facial motion synthesis systems, real-time lip-sync engines, and motion capture integration workflows. 3. Build and integrate TTS, voice cloning, and audio-driven facial animation solutions within multimodal avatar systems. 4. Optimize and deploy avatar solutions across web, mobile, and desktop platforms using engines such as Unity, Unreal Engine, Three.js, and Babylon.js. 5. Research, evaluate, and prototype advanced avatar technologies and open-source frameworks, while maintaining technical documentation and knowledge sharing.
        Python
        Data Analytics
        Machine Learning
        Natural Language Processing (NLP)
        Deep Learning
        Artificial intelligence
        FastAPI
        +2 more
        7 days ago

        Associate Software Developer

        CyberBoxer

        Actively hiring

        Work from home

        ₹ 4,50,000 - 6,00,000 ₹ 4,50,000 - 6,00,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        Key Responsibilities - Develop, test, and maintain backend applications using Python. - Build and enhance web services and APIs using Flask and FastAPI frameworks. - Design, implement, and consume RESTful APIs following industry best practices. - Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to coding standards. - Collaborate with senior developers to design and implement new features and enhancements. - Participate in code reviews and incorporate feedback to improve code quality. - Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application issues in development and production environments. - Optimize application performance and scalability through efficient coding practices. - Apply Data Structures and Algorithms concepts to solve technical problems efficiently. - Write unit tests and perform integration testing to ensure software reliability. - Work with databases to design queries, manage data, and support application requirements. - Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives. - Learn and adapt to new technologies, tools, and development methodologies. - Assist in deployment, monitoring, and maintenance of applications in cloud or on-premise environments. - Collaborate with cross-functional teams including frontend developers, QA engineers, and product stakeholders.
        JavaScript
        Python
        Linux
        SQL
        Algorithms
        Data Structures
        REST API
        +3 more
        3 weeks ago

        AI/ML Engineer (Backend)

        SnapFind

        Actively hiring

        Bangalore

        ₹ 4,00,000 - 6,00,000 ₹ 4,00,000 - 6,00,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        Key Responsibilities: 1. Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs for AI/ML-powered applications. 2. Build, train, evaluate, and optimize machine learning models for production environments. 3. Deploy, monitor, and maintain ML solutions throughout their lifecycle. 4. Develop REST APIs using Python frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, or Django. 5. Design and optimize database schemas, queries, and data pipelines. 6. Implement MLOps practices, including model versioning, tracking, monitoring, and lifecycle management. 7. Collaborate with product, engineering, and business teams to deliver impactful AI-driven solutions. 8. Troubleshoot production issues, optimize system performance, and ensure model reliability. 9. Follow software engineering best practices, including testing, documentation, and code reviews.
        Python
        Django
        REST API
        Flask
        FastAPI
        Microservices
        7 days ago

        Ai Platform Engineer

        Infoware

        Actively hiring

        Ahmedabad (Hybrid)

        ₹ 4,00,000 - 5,00,000 ₹ 4,00,000 - 5,00,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        We are looking for an AI Platform Engineer to build the foundation of our next-generation AI products. You will design and develop scalable AI systems that combine LLMs, AI agents, RAG, memory, workflows, and APIs to automate complex business processes and deliver intelligent user experiences. This is a hands-on engineering role for someone who enjoys building production-grade AI platforms, not just AI demos. What You'll Build: 1. Multi-agent AI systems and autonomous workflows. 2. RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) platforms. 3. Long-term and short-term memory architectures. 4. AI orchestration engines and workflow automation. 5. APIs and microservices powering AI applications. 6. Multi-tenant AI infrastructure. 7. Knowledge ingestion and vector search pipelines. 8. AI copilots and domain-specific assistants. Key Responsibilities: 1. Design and develop AI agent frameworks and orchestration layers. 2. Build scalable APIs using Node.js, TypeScript, Python, or similar technologies. 3. Implement RAG pipelines, including ingestion, chunking, embeddings, retrieval, and ranking. 4. Design memory systems for conversational and task-oriented agents. 5. Create workflow engines that integrate AI agents with business processes. 6. Integrate LLMs, vector databases, external tools, and enterprise systems. 7. Implement guardrails, observability, evaluation, and monitoring frameworks. 8. Optimize the latency, cost, and reliability of AI systems. 9. Mentor engineers and establish engineering best practices.
        Python
        Machine Learning
        FastAPI
        Artificial Intelligence Markup Language (AIML)
        LangChain
        LLMOps
        3 weeks ago

        AI Engineer - Artificial Intelligence (Computer Vision, NLP & GenerativeAI)

        ProductizeTech

        Work from home

        ₹ 4,00,000 - 5,00,000 ₹ 4,00,000 - 5,00,000 /year
        No experience required
        Key responsibilities 1. Develop and fine-tune models in computer vision, generative AI, and NLP, including large language models. 2. Apply OpenCV deep learning and image processing techniques using Python. 3. Implement algorithms for image processing, object detection, tracking, recognition, and feature extraction. 4. Manage multiple projects simultaneously with flexibility, adaptability, and a growth mindset. 5. Provide regular updates to the team lead and ensure the timely delivery of project milestones. 6. Collaborate with the assigned team leader for guidance on problem-solving and technical strategy. 7. Communicate progress and consistently report any roadblocks to the team. 8. Develop and deploy AI models using FastAPI-based REST APIs. 9. Build interactive AI applications using Streamlit. 10. Follow clean coding practices and maintain thorough documentation. 11. Stay current with emerging technologies, libraries, and frameworks in the AI domain. 12. Work 9 hours per day, 6 days a week, and maintain detailed records of daily progress. 13. Take ownership of product development and perform thorough end-to-end testing. 14. Leverage tools like ChatGPT, Cursor, and Copilot to assist with development. 15. Apply from Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. 16. Communicate effectively in English or Hindi. Note: There will be a 3-month probationary period during which ProductizeTech reserves the right to terminate employment based on performance.
        OpenCV
        Python
        Git
        Machine Learning
        Docker
        Computer Vision
        Natural Language Processing (NLP)
        +5 more
        3 days ago

        Full Stack Developer

        Omni Value Solutions

        Bangalore

        ₹ 3,20,000 - 4,00,000 ₹ 3,20,000 - 4,00,000 /year
        No experience required
        Key responsibilities: 1. Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using Vue.js 3, Node.js/Express, and MongoDB. 2. Implement and optimize graph database solutions using Neo4j, with the ability to write queries in Cypher. 3. Integrate OpenAI or Anthropic APIs into our applications to enhance user experiences 4. Develop and maintain graph-based RAG implementations for information retrieval and generation 5. Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code 6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions 7. Continuously learn and apply new technologies and best practices
        MySQL
        JavaScript
        Node.js
        Automation
        Frontend development
        Backend development
        Vue.js
        +2 more
        3 weeks ago
        Fresher Job

        PHP Developer

        Prarang

        Actively hiring

        Noida

        ₹ 2,50,000 - 6,50,000 ₹ 2,50,000 - 6,50,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        We are seeking a passionate Software Developer with hands-on experience in PHP/Laravel, React and Python (FastAPI) who is also eager to work on AI/ML-driven applications. You will join our agile team responsible for maintaining and enhancing our existing CRM platforms - systems built on Laravel/PHP that support our daily operation. In addition, you will contribute to our analytical products such as India and World Planners, and several upcoming AI and Machine Learning projects involving technologies like Stable Diffusion and prediction model. please see our websites: 1.   https://prarang.in 2.   https://apratyaksh.com This role is ideal for developers who enjoy end-to-end problem solving, love to experiment with emerging AI technologies, and thrive in a culture that values continuous learning and cross-domain innovation. Responsibilities. ·      Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using Laravel (PHP), React and FastAPI (Python). ·      Work on existing CRM systems and enhance them with new features, integrations, and performance optimisations. ·       Build and deploy REST ful APIs and micro services for internal and external products. ·      Collaborate with the AI/ML and data teams to integrate intelligent modules, analytics, and automation workflows. ·       Ensure secure, maintainable, and testable code with clear documentation. ·       Participate in code reviews, testing, debugging, and production support. ·       Contribute to architecture decisions, version control (Git), and CI/CD pipelines. ·      Stay updated with the latest trends in AI-assisted development, modern web frameworks, and data engineering tools. Skills Required: - ·       Proficiency in PHP (Core/Laravel) with strong understanding of MVC architecture. ·       Hands-on experience in Python (FastAPI preferred) for backend development. ·       Solid understanding of MySQL/SQL and database schema design. ·       Familiarity with REST APIs, authentication (JWT/OAuth), and server-side security practices. ·       Exposure to AI-assisted coding tools (GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, etc.). ·       Strong debugging, optimisation, and problem-solving skills. ·       Basic knowledge of frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Tailwind,  React). ·       Experience integrating third-party APIs or payment gateways (Stripe, etc.). ·       Understanding of  deployment workflows on cloud platforms (AWS, etc.). Educational qualifications ·      MCA / B.Tech / BCA / or equivalent qualification in Computer Science or related field. ·      Understanding of UI/UX standards, responsive design, and cross-platform compatibility. ·      Knowledge of front-end techs like HTML, CSS, JavaScript,Tailwind and  React is a plus. ·      Understanding of security concepts and best practices for mobile and web apps. Experience Proven 2 to 8 years of experience developing web applications using PHP/MySQL/SQL/Python.
        PHP
        MySQL
        JavaScript
        Python
        SQL
        UI & UX Design
        Laravel
        +13 more
        3 weeks ago

        Python Developer

        DevsTree IT Services Private Limited

        Work from home

        ₹ 2,40,000 - 3,20,000 ₹ 2,40,000 - 3,20,000 /year
        1 year(s)
        We are looking for a skilled Python developer to design, develop, and maintain efficient, scalable, and secure backend solutions. You will work on cutting-edge software products, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and contribute to the entire software development lifecycle. Key Responsibilities: 1. Develop and maintain high-quality, efficient, and scalable backend applications using Python and frameworks like Django and Fast API. 2. Design and implement robust RESTful APIs for seamless system integration. 3. Work with databases such as PostgreSQL and MySQL to ensure high-performance data storage and retrieval. 4. Implement Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence models to solve complex business problems and enhance product features. 5. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code; participate in code reviews to ensure best practices. 6. Utilize Git for version control and collaborate within an Agile development environment. 7. Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing systems to improve performance and user experience.

        HTML
        CSS
        Python
        Git
        Django

        Artificial Intelligence (AI) Associate

        ThinkQuotient Software Private Limited

        Actively hiring

        Pune (Hybrid)

        ₹ 2,00,000 ₹ 2,00,000 /year
        No experience required
        Key responsibilities: Develop and support Gen AI-based applications using Python and FastAPI. Work on backend APIs, database integration, and frontend coordination.Assist in building AI features using LLMs, RAG, embeddings, and prompt engineering. Work with databases such as MySQL and PostgreSQL. Integrate AI models and tools into business applications. Support React-based frontend development and API integration. Participate in requirement understanding, development, testing, and deployment activities. Prepare and present application demos to clients. Visit client locations whenever required. Follow basic SDLC practices including requirement analysis, development, testing, documentation, and support. Use Gen AI tools effectively to improve productivity and development qualit 1. 2. 3.

        AI Engineer

        HEU Technologies Private Limited

        Actively hiring
        Kochi
        ₹ 20,000 /month
        6 Months
        1. Develop Python-based applications or prototypes that integrate large language models (LLMs) using frameworks like LangChain, Haystack, or custom agentic architectures. 2. Collaborate on building multi-step pipelines (MCP) where components handle distinct tasks such as retrieval, reasoning, and action execution. 3. Assist in designing, testing, and refining prompt engineering strategies to improve LLM performance across varied use cases. 4. Contribute to the automation of workflows involving tools like OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar API-driven LLM platforms. 5. Work with senior engineers to benchmark and evaluate the effectiveness of agentic workflows. 6. Document code, API usage, and design decisions clearly for future team reference. 7. Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and technical discussions.

        Click here if you want to get a job. You can update your preferences (profile or location) and use relevant filters to find jobs in your preferred profile/location.
        All jobs on Internshala come with a salary range of ₹10543 to ₹99449 per month in India.
        You can apply for a job on Internshala by following these steps-
        • Click on 'View Details' to get details about the company and the profile.
        • Go through the details thoroughly and apply for jobs where your profile matches the requirements of the company.
        • Click on 'Apply Now' and follow the steps to submit your application.
        If not registered on Internshala, first register yourself and then click on 'Apply Now'.
        Absolutely not! Internshala is a free platform. You don't have to pay anything to apply for jobs on Internshala.
        You can find 5,000+ jobs, fresher jobs, work from home jobs, and part time jobs in your preferred location or profile on Internshala.
        You can check out the following courses for placement -
        • Digital Marketing course with placement
        • Data Science course with placement
        • Full Stack Developer course with placement
        • Product Management course with placement
        • UI UX Design course with placement
        • HR Course with placement
        • Electric Vehicle course with placement
        • Banking Sales course with placement
        • Software Testing course with placement
        Internshala offers a number of certified courses to improve your skill set. Check them out here -
        • Web Development Course
        • Python Course
        • Ethical Hacking Course
        • Java Course
        • Digital Marketing Course
        • Data Science Course
        • Tally Course
        • Machine Learning Course
        • UI UX Design Course
        Join the pool of 21Mn+ students and get started with your career
        PLAY STORE RATINGS
        4.4
        (42K Reviews)
        Get it on Google Play
        Must-have app for students
        I got my first internship from here. Internshala is must for career oriented students. This app has a lot of opportunities for every kind of students.
        Yogesh Singh
        I landed a job at Amazon
        I applied to Amazon and got the job! It was my dream. I wanted to get in tech but I was from electrical background. My friend suggested Data Science Placement Guarantee Course. In the course, I learnt SQL, Python, Tableau & worked on a lot of projects which came in handy in my interviews. I was able to explain the concepts and applications well. The placement team helped me with everything.
        Yaswanth Mandapati
        Placement guarantee works
        100% guarantee de rahe the, mujhe 100% doubt tha ki placement hogi bhi ya nahi. Truth is I got a placement. I didn't have any idea of how to enter corporate, what kind of job would be a good fit for me and where to start. In the placement guarantee course, I learnt so much and even before I completed it, I got an internship.
        Pankaj
        First choice for job search
        Internshala has helped me get into internships and i have got many calls from hirers through internshala. i would be using it frequently for my job search and would be my first prioritized job search app as it gave me more opportunities to explore. would be looking forward for more opportunities.
        Preethika Anand
        Great platform for upskilling
        Internshala is really a great platform to learn skills and the team is really helpful. Whenever you drop your problems they just resolve within few hours. Really glad to complete this course with Internshala Trainings.
        Deepesh Rai
        Got an internship at Flipkart
        I was getting rejected in my campus placements was so disappointed. My professor recommended Internshala's data science placement guarantee course. I joined the course and learnt data science & machine learning. I also learnt how to crack interviews, make a resume, etc. Few months later, I secured an internship with Flipkart. It's my first job after graduation. The office is huge. I love it here.
        Tharun Kumar
        Good support and doubt solving
        If I put placement guarantee aside, the skills & knowledge I gained from this course are immense. What stood out for me was the quick resolution of my doubts and queries. Internshala gave me all the support I needed to restart my career - right from sharing placement opportunities to interview preparation.
        Kala Chaithanya Velagapudi
        Got hired for 4 internships
        Internshala helped me to get me 4 internship in multiple Domains and I highly recommend Internshala for students who are looking for internships and jobs
        Anany Pratap Singh
